ksa_text: Skill in developing enterprise data and AI strategies that connect organizational business objectives to data capabilities, AI initiatives, governance requirements, and measurable value outcomes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

nice.top_element_label: Skill in integrating technology processes and solutions

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.
Skill in integrating technology processes and solutions

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-008 (LS, Skill) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5539 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.554, eu_ai_act=0.524, ddat=0.462. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA LS-S-008 with composite 0.5539 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5539 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the LS domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. LS domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5539 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-S-008 (composite 0.5539) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5539 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Digital Evaluator at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.5539 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5539, domain LS. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
